'''竏營h-ch-t''' ('''kazhachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:footplate|footplate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:footplate|footplate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazhachat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhachat|thizhachat]] || [[word:jizhachat|jizhachat]] || [[word:shizhachat|shizhachat]] || [[word:kizhachat|kizhachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhachat|thuthuzhachat]] || [[word:jujuzhachat|jujuzhachat]] || [[word:shushuzhachat|shushuzhachat]] || [[word:kukuzhachat|kukuzhachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhachat|thuzhachat]] || [[word:juzhachat|juzhachat]] || [[word:shuzhachat|shuzhachat]] || [[word:kuzhachat|kuzhachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhachat|thuzhachat]] || [[word:juzhachat|juzhachat]] || [[word:shuzhachat|shuzhachat]] || [[word:kuzhachat|kuzhachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhachat|thezhachat]] || [[word:jezhachat|jezhachat]] || [[word:shezhachat|shezhachat]] || [[word:kezhachat|kezhachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhachat|thothozhachat]] || [[word:jojozhachat|jojozhachat]] || [[word:shoshozhachat|shoshozhachat]] || [[word:kokozhachat|kokozhachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhachat|thozhachat]] || [[word:jozhachat|jozhachat]] || [[word:shozhachat|shozhachat]] || [[word:kozhachat|kozhachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhachat|thozhachat]] || [[word:jozhachat|jozhachat]] || [[word:shozhachat|shozhachat]] || [[word:kozhachat|kozhachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzhachat|thﾃｦzhachat]] || [[word:jﾃｦzhachat|jﾃｦzhachat]] || [[word:shﾃｦzhachat|shﾃｦzhachat]] || [[word:kﾃｦzhachat|kﾃｦzhachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhachat|thathazhachat]] || [[word:jajazhachat|jajazhachat]] || [[word:shashazhachat|shashazhachat]] || [[word:kakazhachat|kakazhachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhachat|thazhachat]] || [[word:jazhachat|jazhachat]] || [[word:shazhachat|shazhachat]] || [[word:kazhachat|kazhachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhachat|thazhachat]] || [[word:jazhachat|jazhachat]] || [[word:shazhachat|shazhachat]] || [[word:kazhachat|kazhachat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhachat|shazhachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhachat|goshazhachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhachat|gokishazhachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhachatnﾃｼ|shazhachatnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachatnknﾃｼ|goshazhachatnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachatnﾃｼ|gokishazhachatnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhachatshﾃｫ|shazhachatshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkshﾃｫ|goshazhachatnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhachatshﾃｫ|gokishazhachatshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachatro|shazhachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkro|goshazhachatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachatro|gokishazhachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachatmu|shazhachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkmu|goshazhachatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachatmu|gokishazhachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhachatsher|shazhachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhachatnksher|goshazhachatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhachatsher|gokishazhachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhachatng|shazhachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkng|goshazhachatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhachatng|gokishazhachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhachatya|shazhachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkya|goshazhachatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhachatya|gokishazhachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhachatyam|shazhachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkyam|goshazhachatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhachatyam|gokishazhachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazhachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachatnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazhachatnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazhachatnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachatnﾃｼro|shazhachatnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachatnknﾃｼro|goshazhachatnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachatnﾃｼro|gokishazhachatnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachatnﾃｼmu|shazhachatnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachatnknﾃｼmu|goshazhachatnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachatnﾃｼmu|gokishazhachatnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazhachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazhachatnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazhachatshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachatshﾃｫro|shazhachatshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkshﾃｫro|goshazhachatnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachatshﾃｫro|gokishazhachatshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachatshﾃｫmu|shazhachatshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkshﾃｫmu|goshazhachatnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachatshﾃｫmu|gokishazhachatshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachatronﾃｼ|shazhachatronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkronﾃｼ|goshazhachatnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachatronﾃｼ|gokishazhachatronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachatroshﾃｫ|shazhachatroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkroshﾃｫ|goshazhachatnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachatroshﾃｫ|gokishazhachatroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhachatromu|shazhachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkromu|goshazhachatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhachatromu|gokishazhachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhachatmunﾃｼ|shazhachatmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkmunﾃｼ|goshazhachatnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhachatmunﾃｼ|gokishazhachatmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhachatmushﾃｫ|shazhachatmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkmushﾃｫ|goshazhachatnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhachatmushﾃｫ|gokishazhachatmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhachatmuro|shazhachatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhachatnkmuro|goshazhachatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhachatmuro|gokishazhachatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
